title: QueryParams
description: Optional configuration parameters for the query.

mode.description: Extraction speed mode. Fast is quicker but may miss dynamic content.

wait_for.description: Milliseconds to wait for dynamic content to load before extraction.

scroll_to_bottom.description: If true, scroll to the bottom of the page before extraction.

include_screenshot.description: If true, include a base64-encoded screenshot in the response.

browser_profile.description: Browser profile to use for the request.
